name: Quiet
tagline: Swiss minimalist — pure white, no tiles, type-first hierarchy, ONE coral dot as the only color · counter-iteration to v18 Stacks
scope: Punch page only · same 4 states as v18, stripped of all chrome
rules: No tiles, no cards, no borders — hairline rules only.
No color anywhere except one 6×6px coral dot when live.
One primary action per state, rendered as underlined text — never a filled button.

color._canvas: Pure white. Dark mode flips to pure black.
color._accent: Used ONLY for the live state dot. ~6×6px. Nowhere else.

font.mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
